description: This 3 bedroom, 2 full bath, 2 car garage home features 1752 Sqft w/ pool! Brick home, walks flat, no visible cracks. Roof is approx 10 years old. Property will need cosmetic updates to and a new AC to reach it's full potential and with a dozen of so comps nearby selling for $650-$700k there's a ton of upside. Low days on market! If you have questions please call/text JT at 512-590-3843. One time showing
